title: Mother and daughter murdered in Nagano: father arrested for attempted murder of son
summary: The 46-year-old man also stabbed his son and is charged with attempted murder.

title: Fukuoka Kōtarō, 20, becomes the new Honinbō of Go
summary: The young prodigy defeated Ichiriki Ryo to win his first title in the seven major tournaments.

title: 10-year-old boy with autism dies after falling into a waterfall during school hours
summary: The child left the classroom saying he was going to the bathroom and was found hours later in a river; the school apologized.

title: Imatō Seitarō, living national treasure of nagauta shamisen, dies at 90
summary: He was recognized for his contributions to classical music and new compositions.

title: Prime Minister Takaichi visits India to deepen economic and security cooperation
summary: During the visit, agreements were signed to promote 10 trillion yen in investments and collaboration on AI.

title: Heavy rain warnings in northern Kyushu due to rain bands
summary: Authorities issued 'rain line' alerts for Fukuoka, Saga, Nagasaki and other prefectures.

title: Magnitude 6.0 earthquake strikes coast of Iwate without triggering tsunami
summary: The earthquake reached an intensity of 4 on the Japanese scale in several towns in the Tohoku region.

title: Trump reports profits of over 200 billion yen in cryptocurrencies
summary: The former US president declared income from digital assets in his 2025 net worth report.

title: Japanese federation calls for Moriyasu's continued role as national team coach
summary: The proposed contract would be for one year and the coach is expected to accept following the World Cup results.

title: Kato Takayuki throws no-hit, no-run game and ties in wins in the Pacific League
summary: The Nippon-Ham Fighters pitcher allowed only three hits and struck out seven in his eighth win of the season.

title: SoftBank Hawks offer number 1 jersey to Rintaro Sasaki
summary: The young prospect met with president Wang and other executives, and will decide after watching the Major League draft.

title: Person responsible for gas leak at Mitsui Chemicals plant in Omuta sent to trial
summary: The accident caused injuries to several workers and the supervisor was charged with professional negligence.

title: Japanese Foreign Minister Mogi offers support to restore heritage sites in Kiev
summary: Both ministers agreed to strengthen cooperation in security and mutual assistance.

title: Chubu Electric falsified seismic data at Hamaoka nuclear plant
summary: The investigation revealed that the company deleted records of seismic waves that exceeded established standards.

title: Atomic bomb survivors in Japan reduced to 91,000 people
summary: The average age of hibakusha reaches 86.66 years, according to the Ministry of Health.

title: Average gasoline price in Japan remains at 169.80 yen per liter
summary: Government subsidies continue to curb the rise, keeping it around 170 yen.

title: Kyoto's Gion Festival begins with 'Osenchi no Gi' ceremony
summary: The traditional event includes the participation of floats and a ritual offering of dances at Yasaka Shrine.

title: Sota Fujii wins his seventh consecutive Kisei title in shogi
summary: The champion defeated Shinichiro Hattori in three consecutive games and extends his winning streak to 14.

title: Tokyo police warn students about illegal part-time jobs
summary: Officers visited schools to alert about the risks of being recruited for criminal activities through online job offers.

title: Japanese professional baseball roundup for July 1: wins for Giants and Fighters
summary: The Yomiuri Giants defeated the Swallows, while the Nippon-Ham Fighters won with a shutout by Kato.
